zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Childrey於1270年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏望塔時，他的父親John Childrey21歲，母親Mrs. John Childrey15歲。他於1315年與Alice Rampayn在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1336年在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏望塔。

nameMeanings.name: Childrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Childrey in Oxfordshire, which is named for Childrey Brook. This is probably ‘stream (Old English rīth) of Cilla (masculine) or Cille (feminine)’, but the first element could alternatively be Old English cille ‘spring’. The surname has died out in England.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Childrey was born in 1270, in Wantage, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Childrey, was 21 and his mother, Mrs. John Childrey, was 15. He married Alice Rampayn in 1315, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1336, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Wantage, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Childrey est né en 1270, à Wantage, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Childrey, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Childrey, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Alice Rampayn en 1315, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1336, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Wantage, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1315 in England, United Kingdom Alice Rampayn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. ko.lifeSummary: Henry Childrey(이)가 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 완타지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Childrey(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Childrey(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alice Rampayn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1336년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 완타지에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Childrey родился в 1270 г. в местности вантадж, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Childrey было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Childrey, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Rampayn в 1315 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1336 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности вантадж, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
